unit.name: WP_Http request redirection-copy decision
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This candidate promotes only the WP_Http::request branch decision that a missing parsed _redirection value copies the current redirection count, while a pre-supplied _redirection value is preserved. PHP still owns public WP_Http::request ABI, defaults and filters, native parsed-args arrays, redirect handling, hook registration, option handoff, Requests dispatch, response filtering, and native arrays/objects.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass request orchestration, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network parity gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
